TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kukung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 67 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga Skaru. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga Ruba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kukuŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēkaru. taj mkjańßu Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a ruő≤a Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Kukung ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 67 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 4 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kukung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kukung hya' ga Skaru. tay mkyahu' na Kukung hya' ga Ruba'. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč kukuŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēkaru. taj mkjańßu Ē na kukuŇč ńßja Ē …£a ruő≤a Ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
